inicio.descripcion: We are UXnicorp, your web development agency that transforms projects into functional, scalable digital products connected with your audience. Specialized in professional web design, enterprise management systems and high-performance web applications.
inicio.cta: Discover how we can help you

sobreNosotros.descripcion: More than code and design, we offer complete solutions. We understand the challenges of building in the digital world and support you with technology, strategy and genuine commitment from the very first contact.
sobreNosotros.acordeon1Desc: We don't just deliver a pretty website. We build solutions designed to convert visitors into customers, with metrics analysis, continuous optimization and ongoing feedback to maximize conversions.
sobreNosotros.acordeon2Desc: We use the latest technologies and modern frameworks (React, Node.js, optimized databases) to create fast, secure platforms built to grow with your business. Your project is built with the future in mind.
sobreNosotros.acordeon3Desc: We explain every step of the process in plain language. Our team is available to advise you, adjust strategies and ensure your investment generates the impact you're looking for. We work as your ally, not just another vendor.
sobreNosotros.acordeon4Desc: We offer professional development with clear proposals and flexible options tailored to each project. Enterprise-grade quality for businesses seeking top-tier technology.

solucionesSector.intro: Here are some of the industries where we already have a proven path:

arq.label: For architecture firms
arq.descripcion: Not every firm needs the same thing. We develop digital platforms that communicate architectural projects with visual hierarchy, project narrative and a contact system that pre-qualifies the client before the first call.

gastro.label: For restaurants and bars
gastro.descripcion: The experience inside your venue needs to reach people before they arrive. We develop digital presence for the food & beverage industry: menu, events, identity and local SEO — all in one place.

tecnologias.subtitulo: We work with the most modern and in-demand stack in the industry to create professional and scalable solutions
tecnologias.ctaTexto: Can't find the technology you're looking for? We adapt our stack to your specific needs.

react.descripcion: Modern and dynamic interfaces with reusable components
react.detalles: The leading JavaScript library for building interactive user interfaces. Enables component-based development, virtual DOM for optimal performance and a robust ecosystem of tools.

nodejs.descripcion: Scalable and robust backend with JavaScript
nodejs.detalles: JavaScript runtime on the server side. Perfect for real-time applications, RESTful APIs and microservices. Event-driven and non-blocking I/O for maximum efficiency.

typescript.descripcion: Safe and maintainable code with static typing
typescript.detalles: JavaScript superset that adds static typing. Reduces bugs during development, improves refactoring and facilitates teamwork with intelligent autocomplete.

mongodb.detalles: Document-oriented NoSQL database. Ideal for applications with unstructured data, flexible schemas and the need for horizontal scalability.

postgresql.detalles: Advanced relational database management system. ACID compliant, JSON support, excellent for complex data and critical transactions.

aws.detalles: The most complete cloud computing platform. Offers compute, storage, databases, analytics, ML and over 200 services for enterprise-grade applications.

docker.detalles: Container platform that ensures applications run the same in any environment. Facilitates CI/CD, microservices and scalability.

git.detalles: Distributed version control system. Enables collaborative work, branching strategies, code review and a complete history of changes.

figma.detalles: Browser-based collaborative design tool. Interactive prototyping, design systems, reusable components and real-time collaboration.

nextjs.descripcion: SSR and optimized performance with React
nextjs.detalles: React framework with SSR, SSG, ISR and automatic routing. SEO-friendly, image optimization, API routes and exceptional out-of-the-box performance.

tailwind.detalles: Utility-first CSS framework. Rapid development with predefined classes, full customization, automatic purge and responsive design without writing CSS.

graphql.descripcion: Modern and efficient APIs with flexible queries
graphql.detalles: Query language for APIs. Allows requesting exactly the data needed, reduces overfetching, strong typing and auto-generated documentation.

footer.tagline: We turn ideas into digital reality
footer.descripcion: We are your web development agency specialized in building successful digital products. We combine exceptional design with cutting-edge technology to drive your business forward.
footer.socialDesc: Follow us on social media to stay up to date with the latest trends in web development

faq.subtitulo: We answer the most common questions from our clients
faq.ctaDesc: We're here to help. Contact us and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

items.pregunta: How does the quoting process work?
items.respuesta: You reach out sharing your project, we schedule a video call or chat to understand your needs, and within 48 hours we send you a personalized proposal with scope, timelines and details. No commitment, completely transparent.

items.pregunta: Do you offer maintenance after launch?
items.respuesta: Yes, we offer monthly maintenance plans that include: security updates, automatic backups, priority technical support, performance optimization and a monthly round of minor changes you may need.

items.pregunta: Do you work with clients from other countries?
items.respuesta: Absolutely. We work with clients across Latin America, Spain, and the United States. We use modern communication tools (Zoom, Slack, Trello) and adapt to your time zone for meetings.

items.pregunta: What happens if I need changes after launch?
items.respuesta: If you hire our maintenance plan, it includes a monthly round of minor changes. The first 30 days after launch also include adjustments. For major changes, we work with full transparency.

items.pregunta: Can I manage the content of my site myself?
items.respuesta: It depends on the type of project. Management systems and e-commerce include complete and intuitive admin panels.

items.pregunta: What sets UXnicorp apart from other agencies?
items.respuesta: We don't just sell you a website — we become your technology partner. We genuinely care about your business growth and support you every step of the way. No generic templates, every project is custom-built. We speak plainly, deliver on our promises, and are available when you need us.

items.pregunta: Do I need to have everything defined before starting?
items.respuesta: Not at all! Many of our clients came with vague ideas. Part of our service is helping you structure and shape your project. We guide you through every technical and strategic decision.

culture.subtitulo: We don't just write code, we create sustainable solutions with professional standards that guarantee the long-term success of your product.

cleanCode.descripcion: We write clean, maintainable and scalable code that other developers can easily understand and improve.

comunicacion.descripcion: We maintain an open and direct line of communication. No unnecessary jargon, just clear progress updates.

agilidad.descripcion: We iterate fast, adapt based on feedback and deliver value in every sprint. We don't just talk agility, we live it.

calidad.descripcion: Exhaustive testing, rigorous code reviews and best practices in every line. Quality is non-negotiable.

arquitectura.descripcion: We design systems thinking about the future. Every technical decision considers scalability and maintainability.

entrega.descripcion: Automated deployment, continuous integration and frequent releases. Your product evolves constantly.

auditorias.heroTitulo: Professional Audits: Improve Your Website from the Root
auditorias.heroDesc: We analyze your current website to identify usability, performance and conversion issues. You receive a complete report with prioritized and actionable improvements.
auditorias.ctaTitulo: Not sure which audit you need?
auditorias.ctaDesc: Contact us and we'll advise you on what type of analysis is best for your project

items.descripcion: Complete review of your website to identify what works and what can be improved, without touching code.
incluye: Usability review on mobile and desktop
items.ideal: Companies with an active website that want to improve user experience
items.queEs: It's a complete review of your website to see what works well and what can be improved, without touching the code.
items.paraque: It helps you know if your page is easy to use, looks good, loads fast and works on all devices.
items.comoFunciona: We navigate your site as a real user would, take notes of everything and deliver a detailed report with prioritized solutions.
items.cuando: It's ideal when you have a working website but feel something isn't right, or want to improve it but don't know where to start.

items.descripcion: Analysis focused on discovering why visitors don't convert into customers and how to fix it.
items.ideal: Businesses with traffic but low conversion, e-commerce, service-selling sites
items.queEs: It's a strategic analysis of your site to understand why people visit but don't buy, contact you or do what you want.
items.paraque: It helps you find the exact points where you lose customers and design a plan to convert more visitors into real sales.
items.comoFunciona: We study your visitors' journey, analyze where they leave, what doesn't work and give you data-based recommendations.
items.cuando: It's perfect when your page receives visits but doesn't generate sales, or when you want to improve your conversion rate.

items.descripcion: Technical code audit plus express cleanup of 1-2 critical modules.
items.ideal: Companies with legacy systems, slow sites, poorly documented or hard-to-maintain code
items.queEs: It's a technical audit that analyzes your site or system's code, and cleans up the most critical modules.
items.paraque: It helps you know how healthy your code is, identify technical risks and clean up the parts that cause the most problems.
items.comoFunciona: We review the complete code, refactor the most critical modules and deliver a technical report with current status and improvement plan.
items.cuando: It's ideal when your system is slow, frequently errors, is costly to maintain or you want to scale it but aren't sure it's ready.

ecommerce.heroTitulo: Professional E-Commerce: Sell Online Without Hassle
ecommerce.heroDesc: Complete online stores with cart, payment gateway, product management and shipping. Everything you need to sell online professionally.
ecommerce.ctaTitulo: Not sure which e-commerce model you need?
ecommerce.ctaDesc: Contact us and we'll advise you to choose the most suitable option for your business

items.descripcion: Functional online store with cart, payment gateway and product management. The ideal store for entrepreneurs.
items.ideal: Entrepreneurs and small businesses that want to start selling online
items.queEs: It's a complete online store with cart, integrated payment gateway, stock management and admin panel so you can sell online.
items.paraque: It helps you start selling online professionally without technical complications.
items.comoFunciona: We build the store, load your first products, integrate the payment gateway, configure shipping and train you.
items.cuando: It's ideal when you're starting e-commerce or want to try selling online without investing a fortune.

items.descripcion: Complete store with advanced features: coupons, tracking, filters and automated emails.
items.ideal: Established companies, wholesalers, businesses with high sales volume
items.queEs: It's a robust online store with all advanced features: coupons, live tracking, automated emails, filters and review system.
items.paraque: It's for businesses that already sell and need to scale with professional marketing and automation tools.
items.comoFunciona: We build a complete store with advanced modules, integrate marketing systems and set up automatic emails.
items.cuando: It's perfect when you already have sales volume or when you want to automate your operation to sell more.

sistemasGestion.heroDesc: Custom systems to manage clients, sales, inventory and your entire operation. We develop everything from basic CRM to complete ERP with multiple integrated modules.
sistemasGestion.ctaDesc: Tell us how your company works and we'll design the ideal solution

items.descripcion: CRM, ERP or custom system according to your company's specific needs. From basic solutions to complex platforms with multiple integrated modules.
items.ideal: Companies of any size that need to automate specific processes in their operation
items.queEs: It's a custom system (CRM, ERP or bespoke software) designed specifically to automate your company's processes.
items.paraque: It helps you stop doing everything manually, organize information, manage clients, sales, inventory and have total control of your operation.
items.comoFunciona: We analyze your processes, design the system according to your exact needs, develop custom modules and train your team.
items.cuando: It's ideal when spreadsheets aren't enough, when you lose information, or when you want to scale your business without hiring more staff.

paquetes.heroDesc: Service bundles designed for different needs and business stages.
paquetes.ctaTitulo: Not sure which package to choose?

items.descripcion: Landing Express Basic + Web Microbranding. For businesses that want to start fast with professional presence.
items.ideal: Entrepreneurs starting out who need complete identity plus website
items.queEs: It's a bundle of Landing Express Basic + Web Microbranding: your page running + basic visual identity ready in 72 hours.
items.paraque: It helps you start fast with professional and coherent digital presence, without hiring separate designers and developers.
items.comoFunciona: We build the landing in 72 hours and deliver color palette, typography and base styles so everything looks consistent.
items.cuando: It's ideal when starting your business or when you need fast and professional digital presence.

items.descripcion: UX/UI Audit + CRO Report. For businesses that want to know what's failing on their website (UX, strategy, conversion).
items.ideal: Businesses that already have a website and want to optimize experience, sales and performance without touching code
items.queEs: It's a bundle of UX/UI Audit + CRO Report: we tell you what's wrong with experience and why you're not converting.
items.paraque: It helps you know exactly what to fix on your website without touching code.
items.comoFunciona: We analyze your site from two angles (UX and sales) and hold a feedback meeting in 7-15 days.
items.cuando: It's ideal when you have a working website but feel something's failing and want a complete diagnosis.

items.descripcion: Start with Landing Express Basic and scale to Intermediate or Full paying only the difference.
items.ideal: Startups or businesses that want to start simple and grow professionally
items.queEs: It's a progressive scaling model: you start with the basics and evolve your website as you grow.
items.paraque: It means you don't have to redo everything when you need more features. Your website grows with you.
items.comoFunciona: You start with Landing Express Basic, and if you later want more sections or features, we have a simplified evolution plan.
items.cuando: It's perfect for startups, new businesses or when you know you'll grow and need more features.

faqs.pregunta: What type of landing page do I need?
faqs.respuesta: It depends on your goal. If you need quick presence: Express Basic. If you want animations: Intermediate. If you're looking for a complete solution: Full. If your brand needs something unique: Premium Custom.

faqs.pregunta: What does each landing page include?
faqs.respuesta: All include responsive design, configured hosting, contact form, social media integration and SEO optimization according to the chosen package.

faqs.pregunta: Can I update my landing after launch?
faqs.respuesta: Yes, we offer the Evolution Plan: you start with a basic version and can improve it paying only 50% of the difference.

faqs.pregunta: What do I need to get started?
faqs.respuesta: For Express: texts, images, logo and brand colors. For Premium: we also hold briefing sessions to deeply understand your brand.

sobreNosotros.descripcion: We don't sell generic templates. We build custom solutions made by people who genuinely want to see others grow.
sobreNosotros.quienesDesc: We're a web development team that believes in creating solutions with soul. We don't sell templates, we build relationships.
sobreNosotros.quienesIntro1: At UXnicorp we help all types of businesses: from entrepreneurs taking their first digital steps to established companies looking to renew their online presence.
sobreNosotros.quienesIntro2: We don't try to "close sales". We seek to create meaningful relationships where clients feel accompanied, valued and heard at every stage of the journey.
sobreNosotros.valoresDesc: More than developing software, we accompany people. These are the values that guide every decision we make.
sobreNosotros.valoresIntro: Support for businesses, entrepreneurs and professionals who want to take the step into the digital world without feeling alone
sobreNosotros.valor1Desc: We're driven by the joy and satisfaction of knowing what we build helps someone grow, improve their business and feel supported.
sobreNosotros.valor2Desc: We don't want to "deliver a website and be done". We want it to work, have impact and drive growth. Your success is also ours.
sobreNosotros.valor3Desc: We don't work with corporate coldness. We listen, ask questions and take the time to understand. We explain patiently and with good energy.
sobreNosotros.quote: For us, every project is a human relationship. The website is not the product, the solution is the product.
sobreNosotros.historiaH2: It all started with an idea between friends
sobreNosotros.historiaDesc: It wasn't a master plan. It was the desire to create something of our own and help others have real digital presence, without generic templates.
sobreNosotros.historiaIntro: Before being UXnicorp, we were two people with the drive to create. We didn't have a master plan or corporate strategy. We just had one idea: help entrepreneurs and businesses have real digital presence, without generic templates or corporate coldness.
sobreNosotros.historiaConclusionTexto: Today UXnicorp is a consolidated team that continues working with that same energy from the beginning. We keep listening, learning, improving. We're not a giant agency and don't want to be. We're a human, accessible team, committed to every project as if it were our own. And best of all: we still enjoy it.
sobreNosotros.equipoDesc: We're not a cold corporation. We're a team where each person brings their vision, experience and personality to the project.
sobreNosotros.equipoIntroP: We have full-stack developers, frontend specialists, UX/UI designers and SEO experts. Each project is assembled with the ideal team according to the client's specific needs.
sobreNosotros.equipoVal1Desc: Clean code, best practices and updated technologies
sobreNosotros.equipoVal2Desc: Unique designs and innovative solutions for every project
sobreNosotros.equipoVal3Desc: Direct communication, without intermediaries or bureaucracy
sobreNosotros.equipoVal4Desc: Your success is our priority, every line of code has purpose
sobreNosotros.equipoCoreDesc: Behind every line of code are real people with stories, passions and the commitment to make your project work.
sobreNosotros.equipoCoreIntro: Why do we show our faces? Because we believe in transparency and human relationships. When you work with us, you know exactly who you're talking to. No intermediaries, no cold corporatism.
sobreNosotros.equipoCoreNotaH4: A team that grows with every project
sobreNosotros.equipoCoreNotaP: We're involved in every project from day one, leading development and ensuring quality. But we don't work alone: depending on the needs, we bring in designers, SEO specialists, additional developers. The team adapts to your project, not the other way around.

miembros.title: Backend & Architecture
miembros.bio: Everything you don't see but works perfectly, he builds it. Infrastructure, business logic and solid solutions. Gonzalo makes sure everything is stable, fast and well thought out from the inside.

badges.label: Architecture
badges.detail: Thinks big and designs systems that scale. Your app can grow smoothly because the foundation is solid.

badges.label: Backend
badges.detail: The brain behind everything you don't see: blazing APIs, organized databases, logic that simply works.

badges.label: Music
badges.detail: He loves music in all genres. Understands that rhythm, harmony and structure matter in code too.

badges.label: Art & Design
badges.detail: He loves visual art and graphic design. Understands that code can also be elegant and beautiful.

miembros.title: UI, UX & Interaction
miembros.bio: Design, experience and interaction. What you see, feel and use, she creates. Ailín combines aesthetics and usability so every project feels intuitive, modern and full of personality.

badges.label: UI/UX Design
badges.detail: Makes everything look beautiful and work intuitively. If you don't know where to click, something is badly designed.

badges.label: Frontend Dev
badges.detail: React, magical CSS and smooth animations. Writes code that works perfectly on your phone, tablet or anything else.

badges.label: Taylor Swift Fan
badges.detail: Proud Swiftie. If Taylor cares about every detail of her music, she cares about every pixel of your screens. 💜

badges.label: Nail Artist
badges.detail: Has her own nail art business. The same precision she uses on nails, she applies to frontend.

miembros.title: Frontend + Backend + Optimization
miembros.bio: From design to code, Sol bridges both worlds. She focuses on optimization, efficiency and details that make a difference. She loves seeing the results she achieves and how each project improves the experience of its users.

badges.label: Full Stack
badges.detail: Handles the full package: beautiful frontend + solid backend. A product end-to-end, no intermediaries.

badges.label: Optimization
badges.detail: Expert in performance and best practices. Ensures every project is fast, efficient and delivers measurable results.

badges.label: Traveler
badges.detail: Loves traveling and discovering new places. Every trip gives her new perspectives she brings to her creative work.

badges.label: Athlete
badges.detail: Does sports and loves being in contact with nature. The discipline of sport is reflected in her professional approach.

sobreNosotros.porqueH2: We don't want to be your supplier. We want to be your team.
sobreNosotros.porqueDesc: Working with us isn't just hiring a service. It's adding a team that commits to your project as if it were their own.
sobreNosotros.mensajeLead: We accompany you to turn it into something real, functional and visually beautiful.
sobreNosotros.ctaDesc: Let's chat without obligation about how we can help you

historiaItems.preview: We were two friends eager to create something of our own...
historiaItems.fullText: It all started over conversations and mate. We were two friends eager to do something together, to create our own projects and help entrepreneurs who, like us at the time, needed a website but did not want something generic from a template. We wanted to build custom sites with personality, that truly represented the people behind each business. No office, no initial investment, just drive and a laptop.

The first projects were a wonderful challenge. Every client who trusted us gave us more motivation to keep going. We learned a ton: from how to communicate technical ideas simply to how to manage timelines, expectations and deliver something that really works. We realized we were not just making websites, we were building relationships. And we loved that.

As we grew, more people joined: collaborators, designers, other devs. Today we are a larger team, but we maintain that essence of 'hey, what if we do something awesome?'. We specialized more, improved processes, but never lost the idea that behind every project is a person with a story, a dream or a real need.

porqueItems.title: Total transparency
porqueItems.fullText: From the first contact we explain everything: costs, timelines, scope. There are no hidden 'extras'. If something changes during the project, we discuss it, adjust and move forward together. Trust comes first.

porqueItems.title: Constant communication
porqueItems.fullText: We do not leave you in the dark. We keep you informed of progress with regular meetings, progress screenshots and access to a repository where you can see work in real time. Always available to answer questions.

porqueItems.title: Close relationship
porqueItems.preview: Open to dialogue and ready to listen
porqueItems.fullText: You talk directly with the people developing your project. There are no intermediaries or layers of bureaucracy. We listen to your ideas, guide you when needed, and involve you in every important decision.

porqueItems.title: Professional quality
porqueItems.fullText: We write code with the future in mind: organized, documented and easy to maintain. We use industry best practices and modern technologies to ensure your site is fast, secure and ready to grow.

porqueItems.title: Human attention
porqueItems.fullText: We know not everyone speaks 'in code'. We explain everything patiently and clearly, without unnecessary technical jargon. If you do not like something, we change it. If you have questions, we resolve them with good energy.

porqueItems.title: Real commitment
porqueItems.fullText: We do not deliver the site and disappear. We give you a 1-month post-launch warranty and teach you how to manage your website. Your success matters to us because we build relationships, not just projects.

hero.subtitulo: We create digital structures that allow architecture studios to communicate their projects with clarity, criteria and professional coherence.

validacion.label: Why choose us
validacion.intro: We know the real tensions an architecture studio faces when seeking digital presence.

bloques.texto: A building isn't just an image. It's decisions, materiality and context. Your website shouldn't reduce your work to a simple gallery either.
You want to attract clients without compromising your discourse. We understand that tension because we've analyzed it in depth with architecture studios.
Instagram can't be your only portfolio. You need a digital base that supports your professional identity long-term.

metodo.label: What we analyze
metodo.intro: We don't start from templates. Every project begins with specific research about the studio.

items.desc: We understand your approach, your way of thinking about space and your architectural discourse.

items.titulo: The type of work you develop
items.desc: Residential, commercial, public, renovations. Each type has its own narrative.
Who you're talking to, what they're looking for, what they value, how they make decisions.

items.titulo: How you present your projects today
items.desc: What works, what doesn't, where there's friction, what's missing to communicate.
The balance between the conceptual and the commercial, between showing and explaining.
Whether your visibility depends exclusively on algorithms you don't control.

demo.label: Case study
demo.lead: Conceptual demo developed to demonstrate our deep understanding of the architecture and design sector. It's not a real client — it's a research exercise and application of specific UX principles.

investigacion.label: Phase 01 — Research
investigacion.intro: We studied 40+ architecture studio websites and conducted interviews with professionals to learn what frustrates and what converts.

insights.finding: Generic portfolios without narrative or process.
insights.body: Most studios show images, but don't explain how they arrived at them. The client doesn't understand the real value.

insights.finding: Filter the right clients before the first contact.
insights.body: "I need the site to speak for me. That whoever arrives already knows if we're aligned."

insights.finding: Show methodology with the same strength as the renders.
insights.body: Industry references expose their creative process. The result attracts the ideal client and repels those who don't fit.

decisiones.label: Phase 02 — Design decisions
decisiones.titulo: Each element responds to a finding.
decisiones.intro: Nothing is decorative. Typography, color, space and language were defined from what we found in research.

items.desc: Monospaced fonts that evoke blueprints. Communicates precision.
Color doesn't compete with photos. Architecture is the protagonist.
2-3x larger padding. Architects value negative space.
No inflated marketing. Technical terms that speak to the professional.
Like a blueprint: information ordered by visual importance.
High-quality images without sacrificing speed. Technology that doesn't interfere.

estructura.label: Phase 03 — Site structure
estructura.titulo: Information architecture that communicates and converts.
estructura.intro: Five sections, each with a specific goal. Nothing extra, nothing missing.

items.desc: Architectural hero statement that positions the studio in 3 seconds. Visual manifesto that communicates design philosophy without redundant explanations.
Work methodology clearly exposed. Not generic promises, but real conceptual process.
Portfolio structured by typology and scale. Each project includes: briefing, decisions, materiality and result. Not just photos, but project narrative.
Technical capabilities and project scope. Studio specialties communicated with professional precision.
Form that filters projects from the first contact. Strategic questions about budget, timing and expectations.

resultado.label: Your turn
resultado.headline: Does your studio need something like this?

trust.label: Free diagnosis
trust.desc: First consultation to understand your studio and what you need to communicate.

trust.label: Delivery in 1-2 weeks
trust.desc: Process with clear stages. You know at every moment where we are.

trust.label: Research-based
trust.desc: Every decision responds to data from your sector, not generic trends.

resultado.nota: BRÜNN STUDIO is a fictional case created for demonstrative purposes.

capacidades.label: What we develop
capacidades.titulo: Everything a studio needs to grow.

items.desc: Naming, palette, typography and tone of voice coordinated so the site speaks like your studio.
Digital spaces to explain processes, decisions and design thinking beyond imagery.
Forms that qualify and organize contacts according to the project profile that interests you.
Organic positioning to attract the type of client you're looking for by area and specialty.
Solid, fast, scalable technology prepared to evolve with your studio.
Site in Spanish and English for studios working with international clients or competitions.

proceso.label: How we work
proceso.titulo: A process built for demanding studios.
proceso.nota: Timelines are estimates based on complexity. We adjust them at the initial diagnosis.

items.desc: In-depth conversation with the studio and analysis of design identity and current situation.
We design the site's digital architecture: hierarchies, narrative and information flow.
We build a visual proposal aligned with your design language and aesthetic criteria.
We implement a solid, optimized, self-manageable and scalable platform.
Go live, training and ongoing support during the site's evolution.

beneficios.label: Results
beneficios.titulo: What changes when the structure is right
beneficios.declaracion: We don't promise immediate results. We build sustainable structures.

items.desc: Your projects are better understood because the digital structure accompanies your architectural narrative.
A well-thought-out site communicates seriousness, criteria and professionalism from the first contact.
You attract inquiries closer to your work profile because your site pre-educates the client.
Your own digital base that doesn't depend on algorithms or third-party platforms.
Infrastructure that grows with your studio and adapts to new needs without rebuilding everything.

cta.label: Next step
cta.headline: A digital presence coherent with your design identity
cta.body1: Every studio has its own logic. Our work consists of translating that logic into the digital environment with respect and criteria.
cta.body2: If you feel your studio needs a digital structure at the level of its work, we can analyze it together.

hero.eyebrow: The decision to visit a restaurant is usually made before leaving home. It almost always starts with a search.
hero.sub: The question is whether your digital presence manages to convey it.

realidad.quote: We know that running a restaurant leaves little time to think about the website.
realidad.label: The industry reality
realidad.titulo: The experience inside doesn't always reach the customer first.
realidad.friccion1Texto: Posts disappear, information gets lost and clients end up calling to ask things they should already know.
realidad.friccion2Texto: The atmosphere, the music, the chef's cooking, the wine selection. All of that defines your offering, and it rarely appears coherently in the digital world.
realidad.friccion3Texto: Hours on Google Maps, menu in an old PDF, events in Stories that already expired. When they can't find what they're looking for in seconds, they choose another place.

mep.label: Before designing
mep.titulo: We understand your place before touching a line of code.
mep.intro: Every gastronomic space works differently. That's why we start by listening.

items.desc: Specialty café, chef's restaurant, cocktail bar or hybrid space. Each offering needs a different narrative.
Many spaces change completely between morning, afternoon and night. The website needs to show that evolution.
Locals, tourists, workers, night crowd. Understanding who arrives completely changes how we present information.
Most visits start on Google, social media or a recommendation. We analyze that journey before designing.
Terrace, live music, tasting menu, gallery. We identify what makes people want to come back.
Where you're losing customers today: they can't find the menu, don't know if there are reservations, don't know if the place is open.

marea.label: Case study
marea.lead: Conceptual demo created to show how a contemporary restaurant can be structured digitally. It's not a real client — it's a research exercise applied to the gastronomy sector.

investigacion.label: Phase 01 — Research
investigacion.titulo: How people search for where to eat.
investigacion.intro: We studied the real journey of someone who wants to find a place to eat: what they search for, what they look at and when they decide.

insights.body: They search by neighborhood, cuisine type or time of day. Rarely by name — they search for an experience and compare options.
Photos of the venue, menu, hours and atmosphere. In that order, and in seconds. If any is missing, they fill the gap with assumptions — almost always negative.
Before leaving home. The visit is already chosen — or rejected — long before reaching the door. The website is the moment of decision.

decisiones.label: Phase 02 — Design decisions
decisiones.titulo: Each element responds to how people discover restaurants.

items.desc: Inspired by gastronomic publications. Visual hierarchy guides the visitor before the text.
Food and venue tell the story. The design doesn't compete with them, it frames them.
The site shows how the restaurant evolves: morning coffee, afternoon kitchen, evening bar.
Menu, hours, location. What the customer looks for first, available in one click, without searching.
Optimized images without losing quality. On mobile, a slow site is a customer who already closed the tab.
Jazz nights, brunches, tastings, special dinners. Visible, updatable, without depending on anyone.

estructura.label: Phase 03 — Site structure
estructura.titulo: An architecture designed for quick decisions.

items.desc: Clear first impression of the restaurant concept. The visitor understands who you are in the first seconds.
How the place changes throughout the day. The same space told in three different moments.
Simple exploration of dishes and drinks by category, with real images that create anticipation before arriving.
Calendar of activities and special evenings. That clients discover new reasons to come back.
Location, hours and reservations always visible. Without calling, without searching on three different platforms.

cta.label: Your turn
cta.headline: Does your restaurant need something like this?
cta.nota: MAREA is a fictional case created for demonstrative purposes.

menuDigital.label: What we develop
menuDigital.titulo: Everything your restaurant needs to be where your customers are.

items.desc: Menus by category, with images, prices and descriptions. Updatable without depending on anyone.
Jazz nights, brunches, tasting dinners, pop-ups. Visible, with dates, without creating a Story that lasts 24 hours.
To appear when someone searches 'specialty coffee in [your neighborhood]' or 'restaurant with terrace in [your city]' and it's not your place.
Palette, typography and tone of voice that speak like your physical space. Consistency between what's experienced and what's seen.
Online booking systems connected to your website. The client books in the moment; you don't depend on the phone.
Optimized loading speed, mobile-first design. Most of your potential clients search for you from their phone.

cambios.label: Results
cambios.titulo: What changes when your website speaks for you.
items: Clients understand the venue concept before entering.
Quality perception increases before the first visit.
Finding information stops being a problem for the customer.
Direct contact with the customer doesn't depend on a post's reach.
Digital presence reflects the real identity of the space.

cierre.label: One last thing
cierre.titulo: Every restaurant has its own character.
cierre.sub: Our work is to translate that character into the digital environment.

cards.desc: Not intuitions. Decisions backed by how people really discover restaurants.
We start with a conversation to understand your gastronomic offering and how it's presented today.
Clear stages and defined timelines. You know at every moment where your project stands.

cierre.ctaCopy: If you feel your online presence doesn't reflect what happens inside the venue, we can analyze it together — at no cost and no obligation.

metodologia.subtitulo: A structured and transparent process based on agile methodologies to guarantee consistent results
metodologia.ctaP: Incremental deliveries and continuous feedback so you can see real progress from day one

pasos.descripcion: We evaluate scope, define the technology stack and establish success KPIs
Work sprints with SCRUM methodology and incremental deliveries
Wireframes, mockups and clickable prototypes in Figma
Testing key concepts and validating integrations
Clean, modular and documented code with Git
Cloud infrastructure with SSL and global CDN

glosario.subtitulo: Understand all technical terms in plain, simple language

items.definicion: Design that automatically adapts to any screen size (phone, tablet, computer) so your website looks great on all devices.
Optimization for search engines. Techniques to make your website appear in top Google results when someone searches for your services.
A page specifically designed to convert visitors into customers. It has a clear goal: contact you, buy, or sign up.
System to manage customers: store contacts, track sales, log interactions. Like a smart address book for your business.
System to manage your entire company: sales, purchases, inventory, billing, employees — all integrated in one place.
UX is the user experience (how easy your website is to use). UI is the interface (how it looks). Together they make your site beautiful AND easy to use.
Making changes to your website so more visitors become customers, without needing more traffic.
Your website's 'home'. It's like the land your digital house is built on. Without hosting, your website doesn't exist online.
Your website address (example: yourbusiness.com). It's like your business name on the internet — unique and exclusive.
Security certificate that makes your site trustworthy (the padlock in the browser). Google prioritizes websites with SSL.
Connection between different systems. For example, connecting your website with a payment processor, shipping system, or social media.
Control panel with key charts and metrics. Lets you see your business status at a glance: sales, customers, inventory, etc.
A copy of your website or system. If something fails, everything can be restored to how it was — like a save point in a game.
Can grow without issues. A scalable system works fine whether you have 10 or 10,000 customers, without rebuilding everything.
System to collect payments online (like Stripe, PayPal). Lets your customers pay by card securely on your website.
